name: hermes-tweet
description: Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin guidance for Xquik automation with read-first workflows and approval-gated actions.

interface.longDescription: Guides agents through installing and using Hermes Tweet, the native Hermes Agent plugin for X/Twitter automation through Xquik.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install Hermes Tweet for a read-first Hermes Agent X/Twitter workflow.
